prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create an E-commerce marketplace with user registration, shopping cart, order history, and product reviews. Admin can manage inventory.
Develop a hospital management system. Doctors can manage appointments and patient records. Patients can view prescriptions. Admins handle billing.
Build an HR portal where employees can request time off, managers can approve requests, and HR admins can run payroll reports.
Create a real estate platform. Agents can list properties, buyers can save favorites and contact agents, and admins oversee all accounts.
Build a learning management system (LMS). Instructors can upload courses and grade assignments. Students can track progress and submit work.
Develop a support ticketing system. Customers create tickets, support agents claim and resolve them, and managers see performance metrics.
Create a social network for pets. Users can create profiles for pets, post photos, comment, and like. Admins moderate content.
Build a project management tool. Project managers create tasks, assignees update status, and stakeholders view read-only progress dashboards.
Develop a food delivery app. Restaurants manage menus, customers place orders and track delivery, and delivery drivers update order status.
